name: Pipeline CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
    - run: echo "Executando testes"

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test

    steps:
    - run: echo "Deploy realizado"
